events.message: Cover Up (pc0002) did not clear on a successful investigate at a clueless location. Roland investigated Hallway (0 clues, shroud 1), test succeeded, but Cover Up kept all 3 clues. Physical card text: 'Clues on Cover Up may be discovered as if they were at your location' — under standard rules a successful investigation at Roland's location discovers a Cover Up clue even if the location itself is clueless (this is the card's intended function). Engine appears to treat it as a pure redirect ('when you would discover 1+ clues'), which makes it unclearable at clueless locations.
